name: Shopify sellers processing 10–20 sales commissions/month tool
description: For Shopify sellers processing 10–20 sales commissions/month, manual calculations cause delayed payouts. We automate commission reporting instead of manual spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Manual calculation of sales commissions leads to errors and delayed payouts.
features: Submit payments to sales operations manager
